meta.step: 1/2 — design & handover (implementation by Claude Code follows)
meta.principle: A terminal you leave open. Colour and motion carry information (direction, freshness, activity), never decoration. The terminal tells the truth about its own data: live vs delayed is always visible.
meta.reference_design: ../Cancri Terminal.dc.html (interactive, all screens + secondary states via review bar)

color.comment: Cool near-black ground. Neon accents only ever encode meaning. Hex incl. 2-digit alpha suffixes used in the reference (e.g. #36f9d066 = 40% alpha).
rules: Direction is NEVER colour-only: up = up.hex + ▲ + '+' sign; down = down.hex + ▼ + '−' sign.
LIVE = accent.up. DELAYED = accent.warn. No other colour may mean freshness.
Glow = soft text-shadow on KEY numbers/dots only (0 0 14–18px, accent at ~30–40% alpha). Never glow body text.
No CRT scanlines, flicker or bloom. Clean surfaces.
Per-instrument logo/monogram accent is decorative identity only and is drawn from the `accent_palette`, never from up/down/warn.

typography.fallback_stack: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, 'SF Mono', Menlo, Consolas, monospace
typography.features: font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums on ALL numeric cells (prices, qty, values, %).
typography.casing: Section labels and tags are lowercase or UPPER MONO CAPS; terminal voice prefers lowercase prose.

transitions.boot→auth: auto after boot sequence completes (~2.7s; instant under reduced-motion)
transitions.onboard→confirm: on 'parse ↵' or file drop — both routes converge on the same normalisation step
transitions.confirm→dash: on 'lock inventory & go live' (explicit human approval; nothing streams before)

screen_flow.review_affordance: Reference build exposes a fixed '// review' bar to jump to any screen/state. Implementation: NOT shipped to users — it is a design-handoff navigator only.

components.spec: 6 staggered log lines, each [tag] message [+ ok]. Tags: [ok] dim-faint, message dim, ok-suffix in accent.up. Blinking block caret in accent.up below. Auto-advances to auth.

Centred terminal 'secure shell' card with traffic-light dots. Brand CANCRI (info), subtitle, '> identify yourself' prompt. user@ row, passphrase row (masked + caret), primary [ ↵ connect ] (accent.up filled), secondary 'continue with Google → firebase' (info outline). Footer: live pulse dot + 'secured by firebase auth'.

Two columns. Left: Gemini chat thread (user bubbles cyan-tinted right, gemini bubbles violet-tinted left) + input row with > prompt, caret, 'parse ↵'. Right: dashed dropzone (CSV/XLSX/paste), ⤓ glyph in info, reassurance copy, sample file chips. Both routes → normalisation.

Editable terminal table. Columns: confidence-dot | INSTRUMENT | SYMBOL (cyan) | QUANTITY (editable input) | CONFIDENCE (bar + label) | SOURCE. Confidence colour: ≥0.9 up, 0.7–0.9 info, <0.7 warn + row gets warn-tinted bg + 'review' label. Primary '✓ lock inventory & go live'; secondary back. Header line: 'gemini parsed N instruments · M flagged for your eye'. Voice: 'the machine proposes — you dispose.'

Bar: CANCRI brand + LPT badge | PORTFOLIO VALUE (23px) | DAY CHANGE (arrow+abs+pct, up/down colour) | spacer | connection master (pulsing dot + LIVE/DELAYED + sub) | MARKET·ET + clock. Aggregate recomputed from positions.

Grid: logo(28) | INSTRUMENT(ticker primary + name dim) | QTY | LAST (tabular, flash bg) | DAY Δ (arrow + signed abs) | DAY % (signed) | 5M TREND (live sparkline, head dot) | POSITION ($ value) | FEED (freshness dot + LIVE/DELAYED). Up/down colour applies to Δ, %, sparkline.

AssetRowData.sparklineSeries: number[] (rolling, ~48 pts; append on tick, cap length)
AssetRowData.accent: string hex (decorative identity colour from accent_palette)

components.spec: 148×32 viewport, 4px pad, normalise to series min/max. Stroke 1.5 (up/down colour), faint area fill (#…14 alpha), head circle r=2 at latest point. Redraws on new tick.

Dot + label. LIVE = up colour, steady breathing pulse (pulseLive 1.8s, scale .85→1.15). DELAYED = warn colour, slower off-beat pulse (pulseDelayed 2.6s, opacity ramp only) + always-visible 'DELAYED' text. Two visually distinct languages.

28×28, radius 7. loading = shimmer sweep over panel gradient. resolved = network logo, object-fit contain, on accent-tinted gradient tile w/ matching border. monogram = generated tile: panel bg, 1px accent border @40%, 1–3-char initials in accent, bold.
Full-width strip under header. degraded = warn bg/text + dot, copy about delayed quotes. closed = neutral panel bg + info dot, 'last close' copy.
Semi-opaque blur over dashboard (it stays warm/visible behind). Spinner (warn), 'reconnecting to primary feed…', progress blocks + 'attempt n/5', 'holding last quotes'. On give-up → degraded.
Counts: N live (up) · M delayed (warn) · positions · ticks · latency(ms) · feed note.
Centred. ▢ glyph, 'no instruments loaded. the terminal is hungry.', primary CTA '[ + feed the terminal ]' → onboarding.
Centred. ⚠ (down colour, glow), 'feed error — could not reach primary source.', technical sub-line (socket code, last-good age), '↻ retry handshake' (warn) → normal.

tick_flash.choreography: directional tint — up→#36f9d0 @16%, down→#ff5277 @16% — fades to transparent over 650ms. Driven per-frame by rAF, not per-element CSS transition.

number_roll.technique: displayValue lerps toward target (factor 0.16/frame), tabular-nums prevents width jitter

sparkline_live_draw.choreography: series array shifts+pushes, polyline + head recompute and redraw on next frame; line visibly grows/shifts left

freshness_pulse.live: pulseLive 1800ms ease-in-out, scale .85↔1.15 + opacity .35↔1 (calm 'connection alive' breathing)
freshness_pulse.delayed: pulseDelayed 2600ms, opacity ramp only, brief peak (off-beat, sluggish — reads as 'not realtime')
freshness_pulse.intent: live and delayed must be distinguishable by RHYTHM as well as colour

boot_sequence.choreography: 6 log lines stagger in at 340ms each (bootline 350ms ease, translateY 3px→0 + fade), then caret → auto-advance to auth ~700ms later

connection_transition_primary_to_fallbac.choreography: dashboard does NOT blank — header connection flips LIVE→DELAYED, master dot recolours up→warn and switches to pulseDelayed, degraded banner slides in, every row freshness→delayed, latency value climbs. Reverse on recovery.

reduced_motion.respect: prefers-reduced-motion: reduce AND in-app MOTION toggle
overrides: freshness_pulse: static dots, no animation (colour + label still distinguish live/delayed)
shimmer / spinner / boot stagger: disabled or instant; boot jumps to auth in ~250ms
sparkline: still updates value, but no draw-in flourish

microcopy.voice: Nerdy and technical, but clarity beats the gag. Lowercase prose, mono caps for labels. The terminal is honest about its data.

auth.title: CANCRI
auth.subtitle: live-portfolio-terminal · v0.4
auth.prompt: > identify yourself to mount your book
auth.footer: secured by firebase auth · session encrypted

onboarding.heading: onboarding · feed the terminal
onboarding.drop_main: drop CSV · XLSX · or paste text
onboarding.drop_reassure: messy is fine. the machine reconciles tickers, quantities & names — you confirm before anything goes live.
onboarding.handoff: ↳ next: gemini normalises your input into a structured inventory. the machine proposes — you dispose.

confirm.heading: proposed inventory · review & confirm
confirm.step: step 2 — the machine proposes, you dispose
confirm.summary: gemini parsed {N} instruments · {M} flagged for your eye. edit anything, then lock it in.

banners.degraded: PRIMARY SOURCE LOST — showing DELAYED quotes. dashboard stays warm; values may lag ~15 min.
banners.closed: MARKET CLOSED — last close shown. live ticks resume at next open (09:30 ET).

empty.line: no instruments loaded. the terminal is hungry.

error.line: feed error — could not reach primary source.
error.sub: socket closed · code 1006 · last good tick 00:41 ago

reconnect.sub: holding last quotes · dashboard stays warm

logo.fetch: Resolve per `identity` from a logo provider; cache by symbol. While in-flight → loading. On 404/failure → monogram.
logo.resolved_tile: accent-tinted gradient bg (accent @ ~18%→8%) + 1px accent @34% border; logo centered

monogram.tile: panel bg (#0d121b), 1px border accent @40%, initials in accent, weight 800, ~10px, letter-spacing .3px
monogram.accent_selection: stable per identity — index into accent_palette by hash of identity (NOT up/down/warn)

asset_specs.shimmer_placeholder: 28×28 radius 7, linear-gradient(90deg,#0d121b,#1a2130,#0d121b) sweeping at 1100ms linear over a 240px band

accessibility.contrast: Body text #d7dee8 and primary #eef3fa on #070a0f exceed WCAG AA. Accent text used at ≥12px semibold on dark; avoid accent-on-accent.
accessibility.direction_not_colour_only: Every gain/loss carries ▲/▼ + signed value in addition to colour. Sparkline + dot are reinforcement, not sole signal.
accessibility.freshness_not_colour_only: LIVE/DELAYED always rendered as TEXT plus a distinct pulse rhythm, not colour alone.
accessibility.reduced_motion: Honour prefers-reduced-motion and the in-app MOTION toggle — see motion_spec.reduced_motion. Calmer variant of every animation; information parity preserved.
accessibility.keyboard: Core flows operable by keyboard: auth submit (Enter), intake input + parse, confirm table qty edit + lock, retry/CTAs are real buttons. Visible focus ring required (suggest 2px accent.cyan outline).
accessibility.tabular_numbers: All numeric columns use tabular-nums to prevent reflow jitter during rolling updates (also aids low-vision scanning).
